value.original: This module contains the Spanish (Spain) translation files for Openbravo ERP.

row.value: This module contains the Spanish (Spain) translation files for Openbravo ERP.

value.original: Licensed under the Openbravo Public License version 1.1. You may obtain a copy of the License at http://www.openbravo.com/legal/license.html or in the legal folder of the Openbravo ERP core distribution.
